display.purpose: Public marketing-side hero only. Never used in the dashboard.

headline.purpose: Page titles in the dashboard, property names on detail pages.

title.purpose: Card titles, section headers within a page, form section labels.

body.purpose: Default paragraph and prose. Capped at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, navigation items, table column headers. Sentence case.

shadows.name: hairline-edge
shadows.purpose: Held-element outline on raised cards in dense lists.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns, popovers, autocomplete menus, sticky toolbars on scroll.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modals only. Modals are the lazy answer; exhaust inline alternatives first.

shadows.name: polaroid
shadows.purpose: Brand-surface print-edge cards (landing globe polaroids). Softer than floating, never on overlays.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover and small state changes (nav items, table-row tinting).

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Default for color and opacity transitions on buttons, inputs, links.

motion.name: duration-hero
motion.purpose: Brand-surface first-paint reveals only (e.g. landing globe canvas fade-in). Forbidden on product surfaces.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Standard easing for every transition. No bounce, no elastic.

cobe.purpose: WebGL globe parameters for the landing surface. RGB triples normalized to 0..1 for the cobe library; literal sRGB conversions of design tokens, hand-tuned for WebGL output.

markerColor.note: Deeper than literal accent-evergreen sRGB; tuned for dot-density legibility on a beige sphere.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Action button. The single Hospitable Evergreen surface on most screens.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(38% 0.08 165); color: oklch(98% 0.004 100); padding: 10px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(30% 0.08 165); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(38% 0.08 165); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(30% 0.08 165); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Tertiary CTA and 'Cancel' beside a primary. Reads as a held neutral surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(95% 0.006 90); color: oklch(20% 0.012 160); padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 90); border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.008 85); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(38% 0.08 165); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field. Sunk-at-rest, lifts to Cream Paper on focus.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); } .ds-input { background: oklch(92% 0.008 85); color: oklch(20% 0.012 160); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 90); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.55; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(58% 0.012 160); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; background: oklch(98% 0.004 100); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(38% 0.08 165); border-color: transparent; }

components.name: Listing Card
components.description: The signature component. Photo wins; chrome recedes.
components.html:
Maple Loft Apartment

$2,400/ mo·Brooklyn, NY

2 bed1 bathPet friendly
components.css: .ds-card-listing { background: oklch(98% 0.004 100); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 90); border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; max-width: 320px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-card-listing:hover { background: oklch(99% 0.003 100); } .ds-card-photo { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(85% 0.04 100), oklch(78% 0.06 90)); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: oklch(20% 0.012 160); margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); margin: 0; display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-card-price { font-weight: 600; color: oklch(20% 0.012 160); font-feature-settings: "tnum"; } .ds-card-meta-sep { color: oklch(58% 0.012 160); } .ds-card-meta-dot { color: oklch(58% 0.012 160); } .ds-card-chips { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-chip-neutral { background: oklch(92% 0.008 85); color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (Active)
components.description: Active sidebar entry. Replaces the current 'bg-gray-900 text-white' treatment.
components.html: ManagerPropertiesApplicationsSettings
components.css: .ds-nav { background: oklch(95% 0.006 90); padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; min-width: 200px; border-radius: 14px; } .ds-nav-section { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); padding: 12px 8px 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1), color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(92% 0.008 85); color: oklch(20% 0.012 160); } .ds-nav-item-active, .ds-nav-item-active:hover { background: oklch(94% 0.02 165); color: oklch(30% 0.08 165); }

components.name: Status Chip (Approved)
components.description: Application or listing approved. Color plus icon — never color alone.
components.html: Approved
components.css: .ds-chip-approved { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: oklch(94% 0.02 165); color: oklch(30% 0.08 165); border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; } .ds-chip-icon { width: 12px; height: 12px; }

components.name: Polaroid Marker
components.description: Sharp-cornered photo card with caption + rotation, used on the landing globe and any future place-marker brand surface. Print-edge intentional. Brand surface only.
components.html: Lisbon
components.css: .ds-polaroid { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 6px 24px; background: oklch(98% 0.004 100); border: 1px solid oklch(88% 0.008 90); border-radius: 0; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(20% 0.012 160 / 0.06), 0 4px 12px oklch(20% 0.012 160 / 0.08); transform: rotate(-4deg); transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); min-width: 48px; min-height: 48px; box-sizing: border-box; align-items: center; text-decoration: none; } .ds-polaroid:hover { transform: rotate(-4deg) scale(1.05); } .ds-polaroid:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(38% 0.08 165); outline-offset: 4px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-polaroid, .ds-polaroid:hover { transition: none; transform: rotate(-4deg); } } .ds-polaroid img { width: 60px; height: 60px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 0; display: block; } .ds-polaroid-caption { font-family: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.005em; color: oklch(38% 0.012 160); text-align: center; }

narrative.overview: Imagine the back office of a small bed-and-breakfast: warm light through a window, dark wood desk, a tidy stack of paperwork, and tools that respect the people whose homes they manage. The dashboard is restrained and precise where work happens (forms, tables, filters) and breathes where it does not (lists, listings, headers). Color is doled out sparingly: a single deep evergreen for action, cream and warm-ash neutrals for everything else, plus three signal colors used only when their meaning is structural. The system reads professional, never industrial.
keyCharacteristics: Light theme only. No dark mode by default; the scene is daytime work in good light.
Warm tonal stack. Cream paper, warm-ash panels, deep ink text. Neutrals are tinted toward green/yellow; nothing is pure gray.
Single accent. Hospitable Evergreen on ≤10% of any screen, reserved for action.
Mixed shape language. Tight 6–8px corners on inputs and buttons; soft 14–16px on cards and photo crops.
Flat by default. Depth via tonal layering between Cream Paper, Warm Panel, and Sunk Surface.
Inter, monoculture. One typeface, full weight range, tabular numerics on every column of numbers.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Hospitable Evergreen is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is what makes it read as action. If two regions both shout in evergreen, neither is heard.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: No pure #fff, no pure #000, no pure gray. Every neutral carries chroma 0.004–0.012 toward the warm-green axis.

rules.name: The Color-Plus-Shape Rule
rules.body: Status is never encoded by color alone. Success pairs with a check, warning with a clock, danger with a stroke icon.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: All UI labels, buttons, navigation items, and column headers are sentence case. ALL CAPS is forbidden in product surfaces.

rules.name: The Tabular-Numerics Rule
rules.body: Anywhere numbers stack vertically, the typography enables font-feature-settings: "tnum".

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body prose is capped at 65–75 characters per line.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and surfaces are flat at rest. Reaching for a shadow to make something pop almost always means tonal layering or a hairline divider was the right answer.

rules.name: The Shadow-As-Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadow appears only when an element genuinely lifts off the page. Decorative shadows on resting cards are forbidden.

dos: Do tint every neutral toward warm green/yellow (chroma 0.004–0.012). Pure gray is forbidden.
Do reserve Hospitable Evergreen for action and active state. Never decorative.
Do use sentence case for every UI label, button, and column header.
Do pair every status color with an icon (check, clock, X). Color alone never carries meaning.
Do cap body prose at 65–75ch even inside wide containers.
Do prefer tonal layering (Cream Paper → Warm Panel → Sunk Surface) for depth. Reach for shadow only when something actually floats.
Do enable tabular numerics on every column of numbers.
Do label inputs above the field. Placeholder text is never the label.
Do show focus rings: visible 2px Hospitable Evergreen rings on every interactive element.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: replace transitions with crossfades or instant changes.
donts: Don't use #fff or #000, ever. Tint every neutral; black and white have no place here.
Don't introduce a second accent color. Hospitable Evergreen is the only voice.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px) on cards, alerts, callouts, or list items.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). The single solid color does the work.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-filter for decorative effect. Tonal layering replaces it.
Don't build a hero-metric template (big number + label + supporting stats + gradient accent). It is the SaaS cliché this project is rejecting.
Don't repeat identical card grids across a page. Vary the rhythm.
Don't reach for a modal first. Inline editing, slide-down panels, and progressive disclosure come first.
Don't drift toward the legacy property-management SaaS palette (navy, royal blue, primary orange). Yardi/Buildium/RentManager is the gravity well; pull away.
Don't use ALL CAPS in product surfaces.
Don't put dashboard surfaces in dark mode 'to look more pro.' The scene is daytime work; light is the answer.
Don't decorate empty states with stock illustrations. Empty states tell the user what to do next, in plain copy.
Don't use border-color alone to mark form errors. Error needs border + helper text + icon.
